bad: vai neu mii tri cen rel edg-pul meda hiq
good: vai neu mii tri cen rel edg-sha pul meda hiq
reason: pul is contour token, not texture token.

bad: va neu hii du cen pink sha pul meda hiq
good: va neu hii du cen rel sha pul meda hiq
reason: pink is not in the bounded color lexicon; use nearest allowed category.

bad: va neg hii tri per red gra fli low hiq
good: va neg hii tri per rel gra fli low hiq
reason: red should be tokenized as rel.

bad: va neu mii du center blu sha sta meda hiq
good: va neu mii du cen blu sha sta meda hiq
reason: center should be tokenized as cen.

bad: va neu hii du cen rel sharp pul meda hiq
good: va neu hii du cen rel sha pul meda hiq
reason: sharp should be tokenized as sha.
